name: Large Bath Glass Canister Brass - Threshold™: Elegant Storage Solution for Bathroom Essentials, 57.4oz Capacity
description:
Add a touch of traditional style to your bath space with the Large Bath Glass Canister from Threshold™. This large bath canister features a jar-like shape with a brass-finish lid for a beautiful look. The canister is made with glass and features a ribbed design to add an appealing look to your bathroom decor. You can use the glass bath canister to store cotton buds or any other item — just add a small bath canister to create a coordinating look in your bathroom.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
